lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require major repairs.
Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior is heavily worn. It has mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be fully functional.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition and has been meticulously preserved to showroom standards. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster with no stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the interior is pristine, with leather upholstery that shows zero wear and all technological features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been garage-kept and strictly maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule. It drives exactly as it did when it first left the dealership, offering a rare opportunity for a buyer seeking a vehicle in truly like-new condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for through regular maintenance. The exterior is clean and presents well, showing only minor signs of use such as a few small stone chips on the front fascia and light wear on the door edges. Inside, the cabin is in great shape; the seats are supportive and free of any rips or stains, and all power features and electronics are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid, providing a smooth ride with a responsive engine and transmission. A buyer can expect a reliable, well-maintained vehicle that is ready for the road without needing immediate repairs.

Get ready for a great value! This car is a dependable choice for anyone seeking a functional vehicle at an affordable price. It has been well-used and shows some honest cosmetic and mechanical wear consistent with its age, but it remains a solid driver that’s ready for the road. It’s the perfect opportunity to get behind the wheel of a reliable car without the premium price tag!

We are pleased to offer this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its consistent maintenance history and robust mechanical performance. Representing a superior balance of luxury and dependability, this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it delivers a refined on-road experience. A premier selection for the discerning driver who demands both excellence and long-term value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been really well-loved? This beauty is in great shape and drives like an absolute dream. It’s been my trusty companion, and I’ve taken care to keep it running smoothly and looking sharp. It’s the perfect match for someone who wants a solid, stylish vehicle that’s ready for many more adventures. I’m really going to miss it, but I can’t wait for it to find its next happy owner—come check it out!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS. This example utilizes the desirable 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a VANOS system refresh to ensure peak volumetric efficiency and timing accuracy. The suspension geometry remains true with upgraded bushings, providing the communicative feedback expected from this chassis. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the drivetrain integrity is exceptional, making it
Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Recent service complete. Interior well-maintained. Minor exterior wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior paint retains a high-gloss finish, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features well-preserved upholstery, crisp instrumentation, and a climate control system that works perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has a documented service history, including recent fluid changes and a fresh brake service. The engine pulls strongly and the transmission shifts smoothly, providing a confident and comfortable driving experience. With plenty of life left in the tires and a clean bill of health from its latest inspection, this car is ready for its next journey.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to rigorous standards to ensure both mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds expectations for its class. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balanced combination of performance and value.

It stands as a testament to conscientious care, offering a compelling synthesis of luxury and performance at a competitive valuation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor road wear one would expect from a well-loved car.
